examples.example: Two armchairs had been placed on top of it to create more floor-space.

defs.def: to cause to come into existence; bring into being; make; originate; esp., to make or design (something requiring art, skill, invention, etc.)
to bring about; give rise to; cause
to invest with a new rank, function, etc.
to be the first to portray (a particular role in a play)

translations: To create something means to cause it to happen or exist.It is really great for a radio producer to create a show like this. creates, creating, created
